author: tomelliot
description: Sync Granola notes to your vault.

manifest.author: Tom Elliot
manifest.description: Sync Granola notes to your vault.
manifest.name: Granola Sync

name: Granola Sync

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* fix: chunk get-documents-batch requests to 50 IDs so shared notes sync by @tomelliot in https://github.com/tomelliot/obsidian-granola-sync/pull/143
* Fix YAML frontmatter generation for multi-line titles (issue #139) by @tomelliot in https://github.com/tomelliot/obsidian-granola-sync/pull/144


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tomelliot/obsidian-granola-sync/compare/2.0.27...2.0.28

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* fix: resolve transcript filename collisions on create (#61) by @tomelliot in https://github.com/tomelliot/obsidian-granola-sync/pull/134
* Fix plaintext stored accounts fallback by @luvk1412 in https://github.com/tomelliot/obsidian-granola-sync/pull/136
* feat: add toggle to silence sync notifications (#133) by @derek-larson14 in https://github.com/tomelliot/obsidian-granola-sync/pull/137

## New Contributors
* @luvk1412 made their first contribution in https://github.com/tomelliot/obsidian-granola-sync/pull/136
* @derek-larson14 made their first contribution in https://github.com/tomelliot/obsidian-granola-sync/pull/137

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tomelliot/obsidian-granola-sync/compare/2.0.26...2.0.27

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

Thanks @rivasea3 for the PR support, thanks for reporting @fredless @jmoreira1

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tomelliot/obsidian-granola-sync/compare/2.0.25...2.0.26
